g.text: The top “Loaded” panel — one slot per file type:
An A2L tag row — the columns you see in the Explorer:
RPM ✗ mismatch Red — schema/structural failure: malformed
RPM ✓ present Green — memory checked — tag/range fully fo
RPM valid White — valid A2L record with no hard incon
RPM · unchecked Grey — memory not checked yet, or no primar
